title: Sonik Dev Workbench Handoff
scope: Repository-aware Codex sandbox, embedded Agent UI developer mode, host and visual context, observability, tools, and governed deployment

documents.purpose: Entry point, product outcome, status vocabulary, and immediate truth
Consolidated functional, non-functional, and journey requirements
Evidence-backed complete, partial, skeleton, and absent capability audit
Existing and target architecture, trust boundaries, data flows, and ownership
Ordered delivery gates, test matrix, and global stop gate
Source precedence, repository evidence, historical provenance, and dependency index

statusDefinitions.complete: Implemented, reachable in the intended UI, exercised through the intended integration, and freshly verified
statusDefinitions.partial: Useful implementation exists but the intended journey, integration, visibility, durability, or validation is incomplete
statusDefinitions.skeleton: Types, UI shells, adapters, tests, or seams exist without useful end-to-end behavior
statusDefinitions.deferred: Intentionally outside the next release gate and not complete

completionGate: All P0 and P1 gates in 04-delivery-plan-and-acceptance.md pass on a deployed Booking integration, remaining P2 work is explicitly accepted as deferred, and the capability matrix is updated with fresh evidence
